title: SIEYESCITY High Pressure Fixed Rainfall Shower Head - Adjustable Overhead Rain Shower Heads 6 inch - Large Round Waterfall Shower Top Spray Head - Replacement Chrome Showerhead Universal G1/2 Fitting
features: HIGH PRESSURE RAIN SHOWER HEAD_ A complete deluge of rainfall that revitalizes your skin and rejuvenates the senses. Designed with nozzles for a constant, focused spray, the high pressure shower head delivers an invigorating waterfall shower experience.

EASY CLEANING RAIN SHOWER HEADS_ Generously sized 6 inch diameter big shower head outfit with 90 spray nozzles offer a full-insurance rain setting water flow. Featuring silicone nozzles for easy limescale removal, low maintenance shower head for years to come.

ADJUSTABLE RAINFOREST SHOWERHEAD_ Feature a swivel connection, our shower head rainfall system can be turned left or right, up and down, allows you to find the right angle and pushes out optimized water flow to rinse soap and conditioner away with ease.

COMPATIBLE WITH MOST SHOWER SYSTEMS_ This rainfall shower head works with almost any existing showering plumbing setup, comes with highly skilled, hand polished mirror finish that will match most bathroom decors.

FIXED SHOWER HEAD REPLACEMENT_ Connect to G1/2 male threaded connection point for overhead or ceiling mounting. Installation can be completed in few minute without the cost of hiring a plumber. Please note that shower arm is not included.
